title: rhododendron borneense subsp. villosum
intro: Rhododendron borneense subsp. villosum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae, commonly known as the Himalayan rhododendron. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rhododendron borneense subsp. villosum include reducing inflammation and fever, as well as promoting wound healing and immune system function. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use by making infusions or decoctions from the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in the form of creams or ointments.
